title: SpaceRole enum: type-safe role enforcement worth defending
description: SpaceRole as an enum (instead of &str with a docs precondition) is the right call. The compiler now rejects any call site that passes an arbitrary string role. parse() and as_str() are exhaustively matched so the compiler flags new variants at all affected sites. A future contributor might suggest 'just use &str and validate at the boundary' — that reverts to the state where the store silently accepts any string, which was the bug before this commit. The enum is the correct design.
close_reason: Fixed in store.rs: panic for precondition, exhaustive-match test, SELECT 1 for existence check; decision records filed
